docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: TODD WENZEL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF APR-01-2010

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WATER DAMAGE RECOVERY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHEZLAOUI, TOUFIF $1,923.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,028.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
